creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
As already mentioned on the forums, I think "yet another mp3 player" is perfectly fine (and btw, I'm also a fan of the good old winamp "skins").

Please fix these two things:

- The portability patch should be upstreamed first, as you're also controlling upstream
- Instead of manual dependencies on gdkpixbuf2 and gtk40, please use 'USES=GNOME'

Thanks a lot!
